title: O0Yud7Yuhnc4Liytygdbppahrqe7Y4
summary:
Main
The Baltic Dry Index continued to advance last week, but unlike the preceding one, the capesizes and the smaller segments, rather than the panamaxes, propelled it higher. Among the commodities, red dominated the trading screens last week, but crude oil belonged to the minority moving higher. By Ulf Bergman
Macro/Geopolitics
The past week delivered some disappointing economic data for the world's two largest economies.
